creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
I only stumbled on it when doing a diff to compare ldb13 to the bundled samba48 ldb.  I was trying to figure out the differences between the standalone ldb ports and the bundled one in order to have a more informed opinion for bug 230705 (it looks like there is no difference).

Thanks for the answer.  I won't worry about the missing patch.
